name: Peanut Butter Crisscross Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat shortening and sugars together until creamy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Blend in peanut butter.
4. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt together.
5. Add the sifted mixture to the creamed ingredients; blend well.
6. Stir in oats.
7. Shape dough into 1-inch balls.
8. Place the balls on ungreased cookie sheets.
9. Press with the tines of a fork to form crisscrosses on each cookie (if the dough sticks, dip the fork occasionally in flour).
10. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for 12 to 15 minutes.
